Our Services

SEO Services That Drive Results

Local SEO expertise for Santa Barbara businesses. We help you rank higher, get more calls, and grow your customer base.

What We Do

Everything you need to dominate local search and get more customers.

Google Business Profile Optimization

Complete setup and optimization of your Google listing. Photos, posts, Q&A, and review management.

  • Profile setup & verification
  • Photo optimization
  • Google Posts strategy
  • Review generation

Local SEO Rankings

Rank in the top 3 for 'near me' searches in Santa Barbara and surrounding areas.

  • Keyword optimization
  • Local citations
  • On-page SEO
  • Link building

Website Optimization

Technical fixes, speed improvements, and conversion optimization for your website.

  • Site speed fixes
  • Mobile optimization
  • Schema markup
  • Conversion tracking

Content Creation

SEO-optimized blog posts, service pages, and location pages that rank and convert.

  • Blog writing
  • Service pages
  • Location pages
  • Content strategy

Reputation Management

Review monitoring, response management, and strategies to build your online reputation.

  • Review monitoring
  • Response templates
  • Review generation
  • Negative review handling

Monthly Reporting

Clear, actionable reports showing rankings, traffic, and leads. Know exactly what's working.

  • Ranking reports
  • Traffic analytics
  • Lead tracking
  • Competitor analysis

Simple Pricing

No hidden fees. No long-term contracts.
